qa_pairs.question: What is the primary purpose of this page concerning job scheduling policies on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: This page is intended to record when changes to job scheduling policies are made that might change the behaviour of job submission commands.

qa_pairs.question: Which job submission commands are explicitly mentioned as potentially being affected by changes in scheduling policies on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: The job submission commands sbatch, salloc, and srun might be affected.

qa_pairs.question: When were RAC 2026 accounts activated on the 'fir' and 'nibi' clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts were activated on fir and nibi on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: On which Alliance clusters were RAC 2026 accounts activated on April 7, 2026?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts were activated on the narval and rorqual clusters on April 7, 2026.

qa_pairs.question: When were sub-allocations enabled on the 'nibi' cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Sub-allocations were enabled on the nibi cluster on 2026-04-06.

qa_pairs.question: Which Alliance clusters had sub-allocations enabled on April 7, 2026?
qa_pairs.answer: Sub-allocations were enabled on the narval and rorqual clusters on April 7, 2026.

qa_pairs.question: Are there any recorded CPU job related changes on Alliance clusters at the moment?
qa_pairs.answer: No, there are no recorded CPU job related changes at the moment.

qa_pairs.question: What is a new requirement for all GPU requests on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: All GPU requests must specify a GPU or Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) model.

qa_pairs.question: On which Alliance clusters was the policy requiring GPU requests to specify a GPU or Multi-Instance GPU model implemented on April 6, 2026?
qa_pairs.answer: This policy was implemented on the fir and nibi clusters on April 6, 2026.

qa_pairs.question: What is the status of the policy requiring GPU requests to specify a GPU or Multi-Instance GPU model on the 'narval' cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: This policy is not yet done for the narval cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What is the current policy regarding requesting multiple Multi-Instance GPUs (MIGs) in a single job on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Multiple Multi-Instance GPUs (MIGs) cannot be requested in a single job.

qa_pairs.question: When was the policy preventing multiple Multi-Instance GPUs (MIGs) in a single job implemented on the 'rorqual' cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The policy was implemented on the rorqual cluster on 2026-04-17.

qa_pairs.question: On which Alliance clusters were the GPU policy changes, including specifying a GPU model and preventing multiple MIGs in one job, implemented on April 6, 2026?
qa_pairs.answer: These GPU policy changes were implemented on the fir and nibi clusters on April 6, 2026.

qa_pairs.question: What is the current status for the 'narval' cluster regarding the policy that multiple Multi-Instance GPUs (MIGs) cannot be requested in a single job?
qa_pairs.answer: This policy is not yet done for the narval cluster.
